title: Event type picker
description: Multi-select for enabled_event_types on a marketing_provider_config. Filters the event_type catalogue to values supported by the selected provider (per data/provider-capability-matrix.json). Displays disabled state for unsupported event_types.

provider.description: The provider slug. Determines which event_types are selectable.

supported_event_types.description: The provider's supports() list from data/provider-capability-matrix.json.

selected.description: Currently-selected event_types (used as initialValues in edit mode).

items.$expr: catalog.event_types.map(t => ({ id: t.event_type, label: t.display_name, description: t.description, disabled: !props.supported_event_types.includes(t.event_type), checked: props.selected.includes(t.event_type) }))
